default.value: Technology Stack: PHP 8.x, Apache2, MariaDB, Tor, Docker, Debian 12. No Node.js/npm packages. CLI-first architecture with web GUI frontend.

Server Configurations: 4 Docker compose setups (single node, 4-node line, 10-node line, 13-node cluster). Each node runs LAMP stack with Tor. Hierarchical cluster topology supported. Memory usage: 1.1GB (single) to 9.5GB (37-node cluster).
Testing: Shell-based integration tests for HTTP and Tor topologies. Basic PHPUnit unit tests. No formal test runner found. Tests located in /tests/demo/ (integration) and /tests/unit/ (unit tests).

Architecture: MVC-style PHP with CLI entry point (eiou.php), modular functions (contacts, transactions, p2p, wallet), database layer with PDO, background message processors, schema validators, GUI layer with REST-like API endpoints.
Single EIOU node configuration with 1 container (eioud-single), 1GB MySQL volume, bridge network, Tor+Apache+MariaDB stack
4-node line topology (alice,bob,carol,daniel), ~1.1GB memory, 4 MySQL volumes, bridge network, sequential contact chain
10-node line topology (node-a through node-j), ~2.8GB memory, 10 MySQL volumes, bridge network, extended sequential chain
13-node hierarchical cluster: 1 root (cluster-a), 4 level-1 nodes (a1-a4), 8 level-2 nodes (a11,a12,a21,a22,a31,a32,a41,a42), ~3.5GB memory, tree topology
Stack: Debian 12, Apache2, MariaDB, PHP 8.x, Tor. Volumes: MySQL persistence. Network: eiou-network-compose (bridge). Startup: startup.sh with quickstart support. Dockerfile: eioud.dockerfile
Setup: docker-compose up -d --build. Node init: QUICKSTART=<name> env var OR eiou generate. Commands via: docker-compose exec <node> eiou <command>. Cleanup: docker-compose down -v
